# Sentinel

> Struct intelligence for Go. Zero dependencies.

Sentinel extracts struct metadata, caches it permanently, and discovers relationships between types. Built on the Go standard library with no external dependencies.

## Key Features

- **Metadata Extraction**: Fields, types, indices, categories, and struct tags
- **Relationship Discovery**: References, collections, embeddings, and maps — mapped automatically
- **Permanent Caching**: Extract once, use forever — types don't change at runtime
- **Type-Safe Generics**: Compile-time safety via Go generics
- **Module-Aware Scanning**: Recursively extract related types within your module boundary
- **Thread-Safe**: Safe for concurrent reads after first extraction

## Docs

- [Learn](https://sentinel.zoobz.io/learn): Overview, quickstart, concepts, architecture
- [Guides](https://sentinel.zoobz.io/guides): Scanning, tags, integrations
- [Reference](https://sentinel.zoobz.io/reference): API reference
